sector_summary: The sectors with medium confidence include Energy, Consumer Staples, Healthcare, and Clean Energy, all showing varying degrees of performance against the S&P 500. However, Financials, Utilities, and Consumer Discretionary are facing conflicts between price momentum and news flow, indicating potential risks in those areas.
